description: Nick from the Solana Foundation Devrel team discusses updates in the Solana ecosystem, including a new professional education program and changes to RPC methods. The episode highlights resources for training on Solana and the importance of updating deprecated RPC methods.
topic_summary: In this episode, the Solana team introduces a professional education repository aimed at training organizations on Solana, discusses the migration of content to Solana.com, and emphasizes the need to update deprecated RPC methods as Agave RPC version 2 is released [t=228.55].
